title: FASpawn
body:
![FASpawn banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fabianmakila/FASpawn/main/assets/faspawn-banner.svg)

# FASpawn
A spawn plugin for Paper.

## Features
- Familiar `/spawn` and `/setspawn` commands
- Per player spawns and respawn points
- Per group spawns and respawn points (Requires Luckperms)
